dslRule.dsl:
functionDeclaration functiondeclaration_1 where
	functiondeclaration_1.body contain binaryOperation binaryoperation_1 where
		and(
			binaryoperation_1.operator match "(\|)|(&)",
			not(
				binaryoperation_1 contain binaryOperation binaryoperation_2 where
					and(
						binaryoperation_2.lhs.name == "getTableTokenIfExists",
						binaryoperation_2.lhs.arguments contain alias_1 where
							and(
								alias_1 is functionCall,
								alias_1.base.name == "tableToken",
								alias_1.name == "getTableName"
							),
						binaryoperation_2.lhs.base.name == "engine",
						binaryoperation_2.operator == "=="
					)
			)
		);
dslRule.description: 规则描述信息，需用户修改
